code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing list")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing target")?
  let target = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2)).ok_or("invalid target")?
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = tokens.get(i).ok_or("bad token")?
    let n = string.parse_int(tok).ok_or("invalid int")?
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
    i = i + 1
  end
  match list.index_of(nums, target)
  when Some(idx)
    print("index=#{idx}")
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
  Ok(())
end
